metadata.description: Complete issue-to-merge workflow skills for GitHub-integrated development. Install all skills — they form a single loop.

plugins.name: gh-weld-issue
plugins.description: Create a structured GitHub issue via guided interview: duplicate check, acceptance criteria, label discovery, and blocker inference.

plugins.name: gh-weld-next
plugins.description: Pick an open issue, check for blockers, create a correctly-named branch, and hand off to implementation.

plugins.name: gh-weld-ship
plugins.description: Wrap finished work in a PR, squash-merge, close the linked issue, and export the session as a Gist attached to the merge commit.

plugins.name: gh-weld-export
plugins.description: Export the Claude Code session as a markdown transcript and post it as a structured Gist comment on any PR or issue.

plugins.name: gh-weld-adopt
plugins.description: Retroactively formalize ad-hoc work: create a structured issue, rename the branch to match, commit loose changes, and export the session.

plugins.name: gh-weld-activity
plugins.description: GitHub activity digest — lists issues and PRs grouped by time window (today, last 3 days, last 7 days, last 30 days).
